stylesheet: QFrame[panel='true'] { background: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:0, y2:1,  stop:0 rgba(26, 33, 46, 240),  stop:0.4 rgba(18, 24, 35, 240),  stop:1 rgba(12, 16, 24, 245)); border: 1px solid rgba(60, 70, 85, 180); border-radius: 12px; }
